intro: OpenAI's Sam Altman stated the company was "roughly right" in its past predictions and dismissed fears of an AI-driven jobs apocalypse, a position gaining broader traction among tech leaders. Ozzy Osbourne's lifesize AI avatar, being developed by Hyperreal and Proto Hologram, faced fan backlash but Jack Osbourne defended the project as "tasteful." Meanwhile, the U.S. National Science Foundation launched a new federal initiative to establish AI education and literacy hubs across all states and territories, while a coalition of tech and labor organizations piloted a basic income program combining upskilling with monthly stipends to address potential AI-related job displacement.
